subject: request for salary review

i am writing to formally request a raise based on my recent contributions and the value i bring to the company. over the past year, my performance has consistently exceeded expectations, and i have taken on several new responsibilities that have significantly increased my value to the company. these additional duties require a higher level of expertise and dedication, which justifies a corresponding adjustment to my compensation.
